vocab.meaning: kênh giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Painting served as a vital creative outlet for me during my formative years, allowing me to express emotions I couldn't put into words.

vocab.meaning: ảnh hưởng mang tính hình thành (nhân cách/sở thích)
vocab.example: My early fascination with stargazing had a formative influence on my eventual decision to study astrophysics.

vocab.meaning: mày mò, sửa chữa vặt (máy móc, thiết bị)
vocab.example: I used to love tinkering with broken clocks and old radios just to figure out how the gears rotated.
Completing a thousand-piece jigsaw puzzle gave me a profound sense of accomplishment as a ten-year-old.

vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận thức không gian
vocab.example: Playing with building blocks and LEGOs significantly enhanced my spatial awareness from a very young age.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm hoàn toàn vào cái gì đó
vocab.example: I would frequently immerse myself in adventure novels, losing all track of time on rainy afternoons.

vocab.meaning: một hoạt động/sở thích cá nhân (làm một mình)
vocab.example: While most kids played football, I preferred the solitary pursuit of stamp collecting in the quiet of my room.

vocab.meaning: đầu óc hay hỏi, ham học hỏi
vocab.example: My inquisitive mind led me to spend most of my weekends at the local science museum exploring exhibits.
Although I didn't have an innate talent for music, I thoroughly enjoyed the process of learning the piano.

vocab.meaning: lợi ích về mặt nhận thức/tư duy
vocab.example: Strategy games like chess offered numerous cognitive benefits, sharpening my critical thinking skills early on.
